title: Motorbike Horse
body:
## ‼️‼️[OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) MOD REQUIRED.‼️‼️

## Motorbike Horse!
This pack magically turns horses into motorbikes vroom vroom

Here's how it looks like while riding it

![How the motorbike looks like in motion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cgpYnwBr/images/bfa51b24542d401eaf288a1cc9bb33539076a831.gif)

looks so epic

## things planned by 2036 :)
- Rename all horse text in the game (in english)
- Motorbike sounds instead of horse ones
- Motorbike (horse) armor
- More bike colors (depending on the horse type)
